title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at ICRA Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at ICRA Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, ICRA Advisory Limited in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICRA Advisory Limited:
ICRA Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA Advisory Limited!
